features.name: firrtl_regreset
features.description: Code should include a firrtl.regreset operation with a clock, an async reset signal, and a typed reset value.

features.name: firrtl_matchingconnect_to_register
features.description: Code should include a firrtl.matchingconnect operation that drives a register with the same constant used as its reset value.

features.name: firrtl_constant_reset_value
features.description: Code should include a firrtl.constant used as the reset value for a firrtl.regreset operation.

features.name: firrtl_clock_asyncreset_ports
features.description: Code should include module input ports of type !firrtl.clock and !firrtl.asyncreset.

features.name: firrtl_regreset_matchingconnect_same_constant
features.description: Code should include a firrtl.regreset and a firrtl.matchingconnect where the same constant serves as both the reset value and the connected source, triggering connect-forwarder logic.
